# RAUSCH - Natürlichkeit. Wirksamkeit. Wohlbefinden.

![Image 1: Cookie banner](https://48b0fc-3.myshopify.com/cdn/shop/files/pandectes-banner-logo.png)

This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience. [Learn more](https://48b0fc-3.myshopify.com/pages/datenschutz) | [Imprint](https://48b0fc-3.myshopify.com/pages/impressum-rausch-ag-kreuzlingen)

Preferences Accept

Manage consent preferences

[Reject all](https://rausch.ch/)[Accept all](https://rausch.ch/)

We use cookies to optimize website functionality, analyze the performance, and provide personalized experience to you. Some cookies are essential to make the website operate and function correctly. Those cookies cannot be disabled. In this window you can manage your preference of cookies.

Strictly necessary cookies

Always allowed

These cookies are essential in order to enable you to move around the website and use its features, such as accessing secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name secure_customer_sig Provider Shopify Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to identify a user after they sign into a shop as a customer so they do not need to log in again.
*   Name localization Provider Shopify Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to localize the cart to the correct country.
*   Name _cmp_a Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Used for managing customer privacy settings.
*   Name _tracking_consent Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Used to store a user's preferences if a merchant has set up privacy rules in the visitor's region.
*   Name keep_alive Provider Shopify Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used when international domain redirection is enabled to determine if a request is the first one of a session.
*   Name _secure_session_id Provider Shopify Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 days Purpose Wird in Verbindung mit der Navigation durch eine Storefront verwendet.
*   Name cookietest Provider Shopify Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to ensure our systems are working correctly.
*   Name wpm-domain-test Provider Shopify Domain com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Used to test Shopify's Web Pixel Manager with the domain to make sure everything is working correctly. 

Functional cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable the site to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name locale_bar_accepted Provider GrizzlyAppsSRL Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Preserves if the modal from the geolocation app was accepted.
*   Name VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE Provider Google Domain.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention 6 months Purpose A cookie that YouTube sets that measures your bandwidth to determine whether you get the new player interface or the old.
*   Name yt-remote-session-app Provider Unknown Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session
*   Name yt-remote-cast-installed Provider Unknown Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session
*   Name yt-remote-cast-available Provider Unknown Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session
*   Name __sak Provider Youtube Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Local Storage)Retention 1 years
*   Name __sak Provider Youtube Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session
*   Name yt-remote-fast-check-period Provider Unknown Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session
*   Name yt-remote-session-name Provider Unknown Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session

Performance cookies

- [x]  

These cookies enable us to monitor and improve the performance of our website. For example, they allow us to count visits, identify traffic sources and see which parts of the site are most popular.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name _orig_referrer Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 2 Session Purpose Allows merchant to identify where people are visiting them from.
*   Name _landing_page Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 2 Session Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites.
*   Name _shopify_y Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Shopify analytics.
*   Name _shopify_s Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Used to identify a given browser session/shop combination. Duration is 30 minute rolling expiry of last use.
*   Name _shopify_sa_t Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites to support marketing analytics.
*   Name _shopify_sa_p Provider Shopify Domain.48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 30 minutes Purpose Capture the landing page of visitor when they come from other sites to support marketing analytics.
*   Name ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY Provider Youtube Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Local Storage)Retention 1 years

Targeting cookies

- [x]  

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

[Cookies details](javascript:void(0))

*   Name __kla_id Provider Klaviyo Domain 48b0fc-3.myshopify.com Path/Type First-party (Cookie)Retention 1 years Purpose Tracks when someone clicks through a Klaviyo email to your website.
*   Name YSC Provider Google Domain.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Cookie)Retention Session Purpose Registers a unique ID to keep statistics of what videos from YouTube the user has seen.
*   Name yt-remote-device-id Provider YouTube Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Local Storage)Retention 1 years
*   Name yt-remote-connected-devices Provider YouTube Domain https://www.youtube.com Path/Type Third-party (Local Storage)Retention 1 years
